description: §23.2.4a E-FOREIGN-005 — a library `<foreign lang="python" />` declaration resolves the file's foreign-language context to `python`, which is outside the inline value-returning form's supported set (`ts`/`js`). The admitted `_={ 1 + 1 }=` block resolves a lang, so E-FOREIGN-003 does not fire, but the resolved lang is unsupported for inline value-flow, so it fires E-FOREIGN-005 (type-system.ts checkForeignBlocks) per §23.2.4a.
